title: Better Trim Tooltips Forge
description: A simple client mod that shortens the tooltip of trimmed armor.
body:
A simple mod that shortens the tooltip of trimmed armor.
Before:
![It takes three lines just to describe what trim the armor uses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53653e7cef7b669bfd2e2f35efe9d9040e049709.png)
![Now we only need one line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c56201881949197a72560145a689098d7b29a72b.png)
The idea comes from [This mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-trim-tooltips), but doesn't include compat between StackedTrimes. 
The brackets around the trim material aren't hard-coded, they can be modified in lang files.
